title: sphaerostephanos latebrosus
intro: Sphaerostephanos latebrosus is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae, native to New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanus latebrosus include reducing fever and treating skin infections, as well as potentially providing antioxidant and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Sphaerostephanus latebrosus are often made from the plant's leaves and stems, which are typically dried and then used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
